message:
test(gui): render and webgpu edge-case coverage for color resolution, cursor threshold, and surface extent

Render tests:
- resolve_fg_color_attr_ignores_style_override_for_explicit_palette_color:
  verifies that when a cell has an explicit PaletteIndex(4) foreground,
  the TextStyle foreground override is ignored and the palette color is
  used directly.
- resolve_fg_color_attr_keeps_explicit_bright_palette_index_when_bold:
  verifies that PaletteIndex(9) (bright red) is not remapped by bold
  intensity — explicit bright palette indices should be used as-is.
- should_use_reverse_video_cursor_accepts_exact_threshold_match:
  verifies the cursor reverse-video predicate returns true when the
  contrast ratio exactly equals the configured threshold (boundary
  condition).

WebGPU tests:
- alpha_mode_defaults_to_auto_for_empty_capabilities: verifies
  select_composite_alpha_mode returns Auto when the surface reports
  no supported alpha modes (empty slice).
- initial_surface_extent_clamps_each_axis_independently: verifies
  that a 0-width + usize::MAX-height dimension pair clamps to (1,
  u32::MAX) — each axis is clamped independently rather than both
  being affected by either extreme.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
